---
name: Policy issue
about: Report a broken or incorrect policy
labels: bug
---

**Which file is affected**
Folder and filename (e.g. scp/deny-root-access.json)

**Policy type**
SCP / RCP / Tag policy / Backup policy /
Declarative policy / AI opt-out

**What happened**
Exact error from AWS when applying the policy.
Include the full error message.

**What you expected**
What the policy should have done.

**How you applied it**
AWS CLI command or console steps used.

**AWS Organizations level applied at**
Root / OU / Account

**AWS account type**
Management account / Member account
